section.heading: Payment of compensation and benefits from compensation fund

content.p: The compensation and benefits provided under this subchapter, when authorized or approved by the President, shall be paid from the compensation fund established under section 7384e of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 106–398, § 1 [div. C, title XXXVI, § 3685], as added Pub. L. 108–375, div. C, title XXXI, § 3161, Oct. 28, 2004, 118 Stat. 2185.)
